description: Fighting styles in the Roblox game (学乱) Gakuran, with rarity tier, official tier drop rates, the full perk list, and the developers' official recommended-height range per style. Drop rates are the rarity tier's combined rate — the developers have not published a per-style split within a tier, so none is invented here.

styles.name: Kure
styles.recommendedHeight: Medium–tall, around 5'9" / 175 cm or taller (shorter builds stay viable)
perks: Last Stand: +15% total damage while at 25% HP or less
Takedown: M2 headbutt grabs the opponent, disorienting them and dealing 1.5× damage
Concussive: a successful M2 slam removes the victim's ability to parry for 2 seconds
Guard Pierce II: 15% block chip damage
Resilience I: 15% chance to clash into a grapple
styles.heavyEffect: Takedown: M2 headbutt grab disorients for 1.5× damage

styles.name: Capoeira
perks: Powerful: M2 hits knock the opponent down (ragdoll)
Heavy Hitter I: +5% damage on guardbreak hits (M1 & M2)
Guard Pierce II: 15% block chip damage
Ginga: dash cooldown reduced by 25%
styles.heavyEffect: Ginga: 25% shorter dash cooldown; M2 knockdown

styles.name: Wrestling
perks: Takedown: M2 grab throw for 1.5× damage
Hyperarmor M2s: heavy swings cannot be interrupted or stunned
Heavy Hitter III (MAX): +15% damage on guardbreak hits
Guard Pierce II: 15% block chip damage
Resilience V (MAX): 55% chance to clash into a grapple
styles.heavyEffect: Takedown: M2 grab throw for 1.5× damage, with hyperarmor

styles.name: Hakari
styles.recommendedHeight: Tall, around 6'0" / 183 cm or taller (slower style; suits ranged, patient play)
perks: Powerful: M2 hits knock the opponent down (ragdoll)
Momentum Rush: landing a full uninterrupted M1 combo opens a 7-second window where M2 deals 3× damage
Guard Pierce II: 15% block chip damage
styles.heavyEffect: Momentum Rush: M2 deals 3× damage after a full M1 combo

styles.name: Boxing
styles.recommendedHeight: Short, around 5'1" / 155 cm or less (fastest M1s in the game)
perks: Untouchable: M2 is a unique 2-hit combo with invincibility frames through the animation; each punch is a separate attack
Perfect Reflex: a perfect block shortens M2 cooldown by 1 second
Guard Pierce III: 20% block chip damage on M1s; each blocked M2 punch drains 75% posture instead of guardbreaking
styles.heavyEffect: Untouchable: M2 is a double hit with i-frames

styles.name: Muay Thai
perks: Powerful: M2 hits knock the opponent down (ragdoll)
Crushing Force II: +15% posture damage on every hit
Guard Pierce V (MAX): 30% block chip damage
Resilience V (MAX): 55% chance to clash into a grapple
styles.heavyEffect: Guard Pierce V + Resilience V: 30% chip, 55% grapple

styles.name: Slugger
styles.recommendedHeight: Medium–tall, around 5'10" / 177 cm or more (extra HP offsets Unstable's added damage taken)
perks: Unstable: +30% damage dealt but +10% damage taken
Guard Pierce V (MAX): 30% block chip damage
Resilience III: 35% chance to clash into a grapple
styles.heavyEffect: Unstable: +30% damage dealt but +10% damage taken

styles.name: Karate
perks: Powerful: M2 hits knock the opponent down (ragdoll)
Steady Nerves: +15% posture regeneration for 3 seconds after a perfect block
Balanced Strike: landing an M2 refunds 25% of its posture cost
Guard Pierce II: 15% block chip damage
Resilience II: 25% chance to clash into a grapple
